When the nine triads of stars beginning with the group of three
stars viz, Krttika, Rohini and Mrgaslras, are afflicted by malefic
planets, the kings of the following nine countries will in their order
be destroyed :—Paftcala, Magadha, KaliAga, Avantl, Anarta,
Sindhu-sauvjra, Harahaura, Madra and Kuninda.
[In these verses our author puts countries under stars different
from those mentioned previously in this chapter. For example,he places
